title: Floppy brown and cream dog plush — clean and mend
description: Large floppy brown-and-cream dog plush — deep clean, fresh stuffing, and closed seams after opening the skin so this lying companion is clean, plump, and cuddly again.
itemDetails:
Brown and cream floppy-eared dog plush in a lying pose: shaggy medium-brown pile on body, head, and long ears; smoother tan/cream velour muzzle, forehead patch, and paw tips; dark brown fabric nose and small black bead eyes.

Likely generic retail or gift plush from the 1990s–2000s in lines similar to Russ or Aurora. Non-electronic—polyester pile and fiberfill only; sewn tags help confirm maker when present.
repairDetails:
This large floppy brown-and-cream dog arrived tired and flat, with grubby pile and seams that needed attention rather than a full rebuild.

We gave the plush a thorough clean, added fresh stuffing to restore its shape, opened the fabric along the existing seam line, and stitched the skin closed again so it lies neatly and is ready to cuddle.

googleReview.quote: The Toy Doctor gave my childhood toy dog some much needed TLC and restuffing, and I couldn't be happier with the results! I am handing him down to my little nephew and can't wait to see the smile on his face when he sees how cuddly he looks. Highly recommend to anyone looking for someone they can trust with their beloved toys.
